data.title: Radio Flyer City 4-in-1 Stroll 'N Trike, Teal, for Riders 1-5 Years Old, 4 Riding Modes, 3 Point Harness with Comfort Pad, Pa

features: SAFETY AND COMFORT: A 3-point harness with padded shoulders
and removable footrest keep little riders safe
PARENT-CONTROLLED STEERING: The adjustable Steer & Stroll push handle with a premium vegan leather grip gives parents smooth
easy control of the stroller trike
whether on neighborhood walks or day trips.
STORAGE AND DURABILITY: A sturdy steel frame ensures lasting quality
while the XL rear basket - made with 100% recycled fabric - carries toys or on-the-go essentials.
BELOVED ICON OF PLAY: For over a century
Radio Flyer has inspired joyful play with wagons
and more. As a Certified B Corp
we create lasting products that spark imagination while caring for future generations.
